sections: Lawn bowls at the 2022 Commonwealth Games – Men's fours
first_paragraph: **[Lawn bowls at the 2022 Commonwealth Games](/wiki/Lawn_bowls_at_the_2022_Commonwealth_Games "Lawn bowls at the 2022 Commonwealth Games") – Men's fours** was held at the [Victoria Park](/wiki/Victoria_Park,_Leamington_Spa "Victoria Park, Leamington Spa") from August 2 to August 6.[[1]](#cite_note-schedule-1) A total of 68 athletes from 17 associations participated in the event.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

**[Lawn bowls at the 2022 Commonwealth Games](/wiki/Lawn_bowls_at_the_2022_Commonwealth_Games "Lawn bowls at the 2022 Commonwealth Games") – Men's fours** was held at the [Victoria Park](/wiki/Victoria_Park,_Leamington_Spa "Victoria Park, Leamington Spa") from August 2 to August 6.[[1]](#cite_note-schedule-1) A total of 68 athletes from 17 associations participated in the event.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Results

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lawn_bowls_at_the_2022_Commonwealth_Games_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_fours&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Results")]

The top two from each section advance to the knockout stage.[[3]](#cite_note-3)
